message:
Security hardening: input limits, cache control, ref validation on delete

- Validate ref names on delete-branch and delete-tag (was unvalidated)
- Cap commit file array at 10,000 entries (was unbounded)
- Add 10MB body size guard on REST API JSON parsing
- Add 1MB body size guard on upload-pack requests
- Cap walkTree at 100K files (prevents DoS via massive tree responses)
- Add Cache-Control: no-store on all REST API responses (prevents
  intermediary proxies from caching repo-specific data)
- Sanitize unknown API action error (was leaking action name)
